notes: Day 26 (Mar 25) UPDATE 8PM ET. Sources: CNN D26 live, AJ liveblog D26, CBS live, CNBC, AP, Bloomberg, Fortune, OilPrice.com, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, Euronews, Iran International, JPost, Fox News, PBS, WSJ, Haaretz, Israel Hayom, ToI, ABC News, WashPost, Al-Monitor, SCMP, The National, GCaptain, FDD LWJ, Goldman Sachs, IEA, NetBlocks, Gulf News, Newsweek, Middle East Eye, Times of Israel, NYT, ad-hoc-news, HRANA, Hengaw.

15-POINT PEACE PLAN: Trump admin sent 15-point ceasefire plan via Pakistan (NYT first reported). Demands: dismantle nuclear (Natanz, Isfahan, Fordow decommissioned), stop enrichment, transfer enriched material to IAEA, suspend missiles, cease proxy support, reopen Hormuz. In exchange: full sanctions relief, civilian nuclear program support, removal of snapback. Proposed 1-month ceasefire. Pakistan delivered. MOST CONCRETE diplomatic proposal since D1.

IRAN 'NON-HOSTILE' SAFE PASSAGE FORMAL: Iran told UN Security Council non-hostile ships can transit Hormuz with 'prior coordination with competent Iranian authorities.' Letter dated Mar 22. Pakistan, India, China given priority. Pakistan Aframax tanker = first non-Iranian vessel to transit since war began. India deal: released 3 Iranian tankers for safe passage. China in talks. Iraq, Malaysia also lobbying. FM Araghchi: 'strait is open, closed only to enemies.'

82ND AIRBORNE DEPLOYMENT: Pentagon ordered 2,000-3,000 paratroopers from 82nd Airborne. Maj. Gen. Tegtmeier + HQ deploying for 'joint forcible-entry missions' including potential Kharg Island seizure. Combined with 2 MEUs = 6,000-8,000 ground troops near Iran. ~50,000 already in region.

IRAN MOCKS TALKS + COUNTER-DEMANDS: IRGC Zolfaghari: 'Are you negotiating with yourselves?' Ambassador to Pakistan: no talks. FM Baghaei: 'responding to requests through intermediaries.' Iran prefers Vance over Witkoff/Kushner. Counter-demands: closure ALL US Gulf bases, reparations, Hormuz fee collection system.

STRIKES D26: Southern Tehran raid — 12 killed, 28 wounded. Eastern Tehran: school + residential destroyed. Saudi: 32 drones + 1 ballistic intercepted in 11 hours (Ras Tanura, Ghawar, Abqaiq). Kuwait airport fuel tank fire from drone. Bahrain: missile alerts, Moroccan civilian killed. Israel: David's Sling MALFUNCTION — 2 Iranian ballistic missiles struck southern Israel, wounding dozens. Israel strikes Beirut southern suburbs.

CASUALTIES D26: Iran Health Ministry: 1,500+ killed, 18,551 injured. HRANA D25 report: 1,455 civilian fatalities including 217 children. Lebanon: 1,072 killed (33 in last 24 hrs), 2,966 wounded. Israel: 18 killed, 4,800+ wounded. 82,000+ civilian structures damaged (Iranian Red Crescent). 17 Red Crescent bases struck. 94 ambulances hit. 55 healthcare workers wounded, 11 killed.
OIL D26: Brent fell ~$99 on ceasefire plan hopes (Fortune AM $99.75, Investing.com $98.57, CNN $99.5). Then fluctuated after Iran dismissed talks. WTI ~$89. Markets rallied — Dow up on deal hopes.

GLOBAL D26: Philippines declared state of national emergency (energy). Japan releasing 30 days reserves. North Korea Kim: 'proves nuclear weapons needed.' China gas +20%. G7 FM meeting Friday (Rubio to France). 400,000 IDF reservist mobilization authorized.

DAVID'S SLING MALFUNCTION — 2nd interceptor failure in 2 days. 2 Iranian ballistic missiles struck southern Israel. IDF authorized 400,000 reservist mobilization. IDF wants several more weeks of operations.

sitrep: 15-POINT PEACE PLAN — MOST CONCRETE PROPOSAL SINCE D1: Trump admin sent 15-point ceasefire plan via Pakistan (NYT first reported). Demands: dismantle Natanz/Isfahan/Fordow, stop enrichment, transfer enriched material to IAEA, suspend missiles, cease proxy support, reopen Hormuz. In exchange: full sanctions relief, civilian nuclear support, snapback removal. Proposed 1-month ceasefire. Pakistan delivered. IRGC Zolfaghari mocked: 'Are you negotiating with yourselves?' Iran FM Baghaei: 'responding to requests through intermediaries.' Iran prefers Vance channel over Witkoff/Kushner.

IRAN SAFE PASSAGE FORMAL — FIRST NON-IRANIAN TRANSIT: Iran told UNSC that non-hostile ships can transit Hormuz with 'prior coordination with competent Iranian authorities.' Letter dated Mar 22. Pakistan, India, China given priority. Pakistan Aframax tanker = FIRST non-Iranian vessel to transit since war began. India deal: released 3 Iranian tankers for safe passage. China in talks. Iraq, Malaysia lobbying. FM Araghchi: 'strait open, closed only to enemies.' THIS IS THE MOST SIGNIFICANT DE-ESCALATION SIGNAL ON HORMUZ since D1.

Tegtmeier + HQ deploying for 'joint forcible-entry missions' including potential Kharg Island seizure. Combined with 2 MEUs = 6,000-8,000 ground troops near Iran. ~50,000 already in region. DIPLOMACY + MILITARY ESCALATION SIMULTANEOUSLY.

IRAN COUNTER-DEMANDS: Closure of ALL US bases in Gulf, reparations for attacks, Hormuz fee collection system. Ambassador to Pakistan: no talks. IRGC Zolfaghari: 'Are you negotiating with yourselves?' Classic maximalist opening — but engaging through intermediaries confirms channel exists.

DAVID'S SLING MALFUNCTION — 2ND FAILURE IN 2 DAYS: 2 Iranian ballistic missiles struck southern Israel, wounding dozens. Interceptor system failed. IDF authorized 400,000 reservist mobilization. IDF wants several more weeks of operations. Israel strikes Beirut southern suburbs.

sitrep_fa: طرح ۱۵ بندی — مشخص‌ترین پیشنهاد از D1: ترامپ از طریق پاکستان (NYT). خلع هسته‌ای، توقف غنی‌سازی، انتقال به IAEA، تعلیق موشک، باز هرمز. در عوض: رفع تحریم + هسته‌ای غیرنظامی. سپاه: 'با خودتان مذاکره می‌کنید؟'
عبور مطمئن رسمی — اولین عبور غیرایرانی: ایران به شورای امنیت. نفتکش پاکستان = اولین. هند معامله: ۳ نفتکش ایرانی آزاد. چین مذاکره. عراقچی: 'فقط برای دشمنان بسته.'
هوابرد ۸۲ — ۲,۰۰۰-۳,۰۰۰ + ۲ MEU = ۶,۰۰۰-۸,۰۰۰ نیروی زمینی. خارگ. ~۵۰,۰۰۰ قبلاً.
ضدپیشنهاد ایران: بستن تمام پایگاه‌ها، غرامت، عوارض هرمز. سفیر پاکستان: مذاکره نه. اما کانال فعال.
نقص کلاه داوود — دومین شکست در ۲ روز. ۲ بالستیک جنوب اسرائیل. ۴۰۰,۰۰۰ ذخیره. بیروت.

نفت ~$۹۹ — کاهش بر امید طرح. سپس نوسان. داو بالا. پاکستان عبور = اثبات فیزیکی.

بشردوستانه: ۸۲,۰۰۰+ سازه. ۱۷ پایگاه هلال. ۹۴ آمبولانس. ۵۵ بهداشتی زخمی. اینترنت ۵۷۶+.

Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation.

SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC named target EXECUTED. 6th salvo at Israel. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed.
dailyRows.capability: D20 REVISED: 45 missiles + 80 drones. SAMREF = FIRST Red Sea coast target. IRGC executing named target list: Kuwait, Qatar, SAMREF. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surged $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114 close. Citi: $120+. SAMREF 'impact minimal' per Aramco but symbolic significance enormous — Red Sea coast reached.
dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones reach Saudi western export infrastructure. Pipeline bypass routes no longer safe.

dailyRows.primary: NOWRUZ DAY 1 — BESSENT 140M BARRELS + NETANYAHU 'IRAN DESTROYED' + TEHRAN STRUCK: Israel hit Tehran on Nowruz. Kuwait Al-Ahmadi refinery fire (KPC confirmed). Saudi 15 drones intercepted. UAE 7 missiles + 15 drones. BESSENT: US may unsanction 140M barrels Iranian oil at sea. Mojtaba absent since Mar 8.
dailyRows.capability: D21: 40+72. NETANYAHU claims Iran capability destroyed — directly contradicted by ongoing launches AND IAEA. IRGC desertions at unit level but institutional level disputed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent dropped ~$110 (from $119 intraday D20). BESSENT intervention: 140M barrels. G7 SPR 400M barrels. Saudi (WSJ): $180/b if disruptions last through April. 1,000 tankers stranded at Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: NOWRUZ INFLECTION + SUPPLY-SIDE WAR BEGINS. Bessent weaponizing oil supply. Netanyahu claiming victory for political off-ramp. IRGC still fighting but fracturing.

dailyRows.capability: D22: 40+75. DIMONA/ARAD = most impactful Israel strike since D1. Interceptors FAILED. Diego Garcia = 4,000 km IRBM. ~40 officials killed. IDF Chief Zamir: 'HALFWAY.'

dailyRows.assessment: FOUR ESCALATIONS COLLIDE: (1) Trump ultimatum vs Iran counter-threat = most dangerous exchange. (2) Dimona/Arad = nuclear tit-for-tat. (3) Diego Garcia = global reach. (4) Saudi expulsion. IDF Zamir: 'HALFWAY' = long war.

dailyRows.primary: 48-HR COUNTDOWN + IDF 200+ TARGETS + IRGC 3RD JET CLAIM: IDF 'wide-scale' strikes (200+ targets, weapons compounds). dailyRows.assessment: THE WAIT: War in holding pattern defined by Trump's 48-hr deadline. IDF intensifying not pausing. Iran UN 'open except enemies' = first selective Hormuz framework = potential off-ramp.

UAE 7 ballistic + 16 drones (cumul 352/15/1,789). Saudi 2 ballistic Riyadh + ~20 drones. IRGC attacked 5th Fleet. Zolghadr new SNSC secretary.

dailyRows.assessment: DIVERGENT SIGNALS: Lebanon expulsion = proxy fracturing. Tel Aviv unintercepted = Iran still dangerous. Mines = Hormuz slow to reopen. Trump 5-day window. Oil rebound = premature optimism corrected.

dailyRows.primary: 15-POINT PEACE PLAN + SAFE PASSAGE FORMAL + 82ND AIRBORNE: Trump admin sent 15-point ceasefire plan via Pakistan (NYT). Iran told UNSC: non-hostile ships can transit with 'prior coordination.' Pakistan Aframax = first non-Iranian transit. 82nd Airborne deploying (2,000-3,000) for Kharg Island. David's Sling MALFUNCTION — 2 ballistic struck southern Israel. Saudi 32 drones + 1 ballistic in 11 hrs. Kuwait airport fuel tank fire. Bahrain: Moroccan civilian killed.
dailyRows.capability: D26: 20+55. SAFE PASSAGE = Iran creating bilateral Hormuz framework. Pakistan tanker transited = physical proof. India traded 3 Iranian tankers for passage. China in talks. IRGC still launching: Saudi 32 drones 11 hrs = sustained. David's Sling malfunction = 2nd interceptor failure in 2 days. 82nd Airborne + 2 MEUs = 6,000-8,000 ground troops = credible Kharg Island threat.
dailyRows.cost: Brent fell ~$99 on peace plan hopes (Fortune $99.75, Investing.com $98.57). WTI ~$89. Iran Health Ministry: 1,500+ killed, 18,551 injured. 82,000+ structures damaged (Red Crescent). Lebanon: 1,072 killed. IDF authorized 400,000 reservist mobilization. Philippines state of emergency. Japan 30-day reserves. China gas +20%. G7 FM Friday.
dailyRows.assessment: D26 — DUAL-TRACK INFLECTION: (1) 15-POINT PLAN = most concrete diplomatic proposal since D1. Ambitious demands (dismantle nuclear) but framework exists. Iran mocks publicly but engages through intermediaries. (2) SAFE PASSAGE FORMAL = MOST SIGNIFICANT Hormuz de-escalation signal. Pakistan tanker actually transited = not theoretical. India, China, Iraq, Malaysia also engaging. This creates bilateral bypass of US-Iran standoff. (3) 82ND AIRBORNE = credible ground threat (Kharg Island) = military pressure concurrent with diplomacy. Classic negotiate-from-strength. (4) IRAN COUNTER-DEMANDS = maximalist but engaging = negotiation opening. (5) DAVID'S SLING = air defense deteriorating. (6) OIL FELL on plan hopes = markets want deal. TWO WARS DIVERGING: diplomatic track gaining substance (15-point plan + safe passage) while military track escalating (82nd Airborne + Kharg + 400K reservists). The question is which track dominates by Friday.

timeline.title: Week 3-4 (Mar 16-25)

Safe passage framework expanding (Pakistan, India, China). 82nd Airborne near Kharg. Key: (1) Does Iran engage on 15-point plan? (2) Safe passage expands to more countries? (3) 82nd Airborne = bluff or action? (4) G7 FM Friday. (5) Mine clearance. Goldman: $110 avg. IDF 'several more weeks.'

If safe passage expands: partial Hormuz normalization. If 82nd Airborne activates: total war.

theoryEvaluation.title: 15-POINT PLAN — framework exists but gap is enormous
theoryEvaluation.body: Trump's 15-point plan via Pakistan is the most concrete diplomatic proposal since D1. Five key dimensions: (1) DEMANDS are maximalist: dismantle Natanz/Isfahan/Fordow, stop enrichment, transfer material, suspend missiles, cease proxies, reopen Hormuz. This is essentially regime strategic surrender. (2) OFFER is significant: full sanctions relief, civilian nuclear support, snapback removal. (3) IRAN'S RESPONSE: publicly mocking ('negotiating with yourselves') but FM Baghaei confirms 'responding through intermediaries' = engaging. Counter-demands (US bases, reparations, Hormuz fees) = maximalist but structured. (4) MECHANISM: Pakistan delivered. India, China, Iraq, Malaysia also engaged. Multiple intermediary channels = robust. (5) REALISTIC: Demands as stated are unacceptable to Iran. But creates FRAMEWORK for counter-proposals. The plan's value is in creating the negotiation structure, not in being accepted as-is.

theoryEvaluation.title: SAFE PASSAGE — Hormuz reopening bilaterally
theoryEvaluation.body: Iran's formal UNSC notification that non-hostile ships can transit with 'prior coordination' is THE most significant Hormuz de-escalation since D1. Key implications: (1) PHYSICAL PROOF: Pakistan Aframax tanker actually transited = not theoretical. (2) BILATERAL FRAMEWORK: India traded 3 Iranian tankers for passage. China in talks. Iraq, Malaysia lobbying. This creates a BILATERAL bypass of the US-Iran standoff on Hormuz. (3) SELECTIVE SOVEREIGNTY: Iran positioning itself as Hormuz gatekeeper — 'closed to enemies, open to friends.' This is a NEW strategic posture. (4) UNDERMINES COALITION: If countries can get bilateral deals, 22-country coalition loses urgency. (5) OIL IMPACT: If safe passage expands, Goldman's $147 worst case becomes less likely. But mines still physical barrier. (6) US EXCLUDED: The bilateral framework explicitly excludes US-flagged vessels = Iran retains leverage.

theoryEvaluation.title: 82ND AIRBORNE — negotiate from strength or escalation?
theoryEvaluation.body: Pentagon deploying 2,000-3,000 paratroopers from 82nd Airborne simultaneously with 15-point peace plan. This is CLASSIC negotiate-from-strength: (1) KHARG ISLAND: 'forcible-entry missions' = seizure of Iran's primary oil export terminal. Would end Hormuz standoff but = ground war. (2) COMBINED FORCE: 82nd + 2 MEUs = 6,000-8,000 ground troops. ~50,000 already in region. (3) SIGNAL TO IRAN: Accept diplomatic framework or face ground escalation. (4) CONTRADICTS TRUMP: Trump seeking 'dignified exit' but deploying ground troops = dual signal. (5) FRIDAY: If diplomatic track fails by Friday, military track is ready. This is the most dangerous dual-track since D1.

theoryEvaluation.title: DUAL-TRACK WAR — diplomacy and escalation simultaneously
theoryEvaluation.body: D26 crystallizes the war's defining dynamic: two tracks running in parallel. DIPLOMATIC: 15-point plan + safe passage + Pakistan/India/China channels + Iran counter-demands = most substance since D1. MILITARY: 82nd Airborne + 400,000 IDF reservists + David's Sling failures + Kharg Island threat + 32 drones in 11 hours at Saudi = continued escalation. These tracks are NOT contradictory — they reinforce each other. Military pressure makes diplomacy more urgent. Diplomatic framework makes military restraint possible. The question is which track DOMINATES by Friday. If diplomatic: war winds toward protracted negotiation. If military: 82nd Airborne at Kharg = new phase.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: طرح ۱۵ بندی — چارچوب هست اما شکاف بزرگ
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: مشخص‌ترین پیشنهاد از D1. خواسته‌ها حداکثری: نطنز/اصفهان/فردو. پیشنهاد: رفع تحریم + هسته‌ای غیرنظامی. ایران رد علنی اما 'پاسخ از طریق میانجی.' ضدپیشنهاد = ساختاریافته. ارزش: ساختار مذاکره نه پذیرش.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: عبور مطمئن — هرمز دوجانبه باز
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: مهم‌ترین سیگنال هرمز از D1. نفتکش پاکستان = اثبات فیزیکی. هند معامله. چین مذاکره. ایران = دروازه‌بان هرمز. دوجانبه = دور زدن آمریکا-ایران.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: هوابرد ۸۲ — مذاکره از موضع قدرت یا تشدید؟
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: همزمان با طرح ۱۵ بندی. خارگ = ترمینال صادرات نفت. ۶,۰۰۰-۸,۰۰۰ نیرو. اگر دیپلماسی شکست: آماده. خطرناک‌ترین دوگانگی از D1.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: جنگ دو مسیره — دیپلماسی و تشدید همزمان
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: D26: دو مسیر موازی. دیپلماتیک: ۱۵ بند + عبور + کانال‌ها. نظامی: هوابرد ۸۲ + ۴۰۰,۰۰۰ ذخیره + خارگ. تقویت متقابل. سؤال: کدام تا جمعه غالب؟

endstate_fa.body: اعلام پیروزی — افزایش ۱۸->۲۰. طرح واقعی. عبور = اثبات. نفت کاهش. هوابرد = اهرم.

endstate_fa.body: مذاکره (۱۰٪) — ۱۵ بند + عبور + کانال‌ها. مداخله (۱۰٪) — دوجانبه = کاهش چندجانبه. فروپاشی (۸٪) — سپاه منسجم.
